title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to Tenant to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Verify data correctness when switching from a Tenant-linked account to a non-Tenant account, ensuring Tenant info is absent.
steps: 1) Log in with Account linked to Tenant A, go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
2) Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account, logout, log in with an account not linked to any Tenant, go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
expected: 1) Tenant A info is present. 2) Account information is displayed, but Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present on the card.
